data.title: March of Dimes hosts brunch with influential women like Porsha Williams to inspire action on maternal and infant health.
data.description: A groundbreaking brunch event brought together notable women, such as author and TV personality Porsha Williams, "Good Morning America's" Janai Norman, and NBC4 New York/WNBC's Natalie Pasquarella, to discuss maternal and infant health. The event took place in New York on October 17, 2025.

data.title: Tezos (XTZ) dips 2.9% to $0.58, nearing key Bollinger Band support amid market volatility and bearish signals.
data.description: The price of XTZ recently decreased by 2.9% to $0.58, edging closer to critical Bollinger Band support levels. This drop comes amid market volatility, with technical indicators showing bearish signals.

data.title: OM price falls to $0.12 amid Bitcoin sell-off and Fed rate hike pressure, down 3.3% due to market factors.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Mantra (OM) is currently being traded at a price of $0.12, showing a 3.3% decrease. This decline is attributed to Bitcoin's value falling below $110,000 and the Federal Reserve signaling a more stringent monetary policy, which has put pressure on the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Dept. of Education to resume student loan cancellations, benefiting more borrowers in income-driven plans. #debtrelief
data.description: Seen as a victory for borrowers, the deal will result in an increase in the number of income-driven repayment plan participants who will have their outstanding debt forgiven.
StoneX increases wealth management services for clients in Latin America, catering to a growing market.

data.title: New tariffs: Light and heavy trucks face 25% charge, buses 10% starting Nov. 1. Auto parts tariff exemptions extended by Trump.
data.description: Starting from November 1st, a 25 percent tariff will be imposed on imported light and heavy trucks, while buses will face a 10 percent tariff. However, President Trump has decided to prolong the exemption from tariffs for auto parts.

data.title: DYDX drops to yearly lows at $0.33 due to recent chain downtime; oversold RSI at 27 indicates possible rebound amidst Bitcoin's rise.
data.description: After experiencing temporary blockchain downtime on October 10, DYDX is currently trading at $0.33. Its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 27, indicating oversold conditions and suggesting a potential rebound. This comes as the broader crypto markets are stabilizing amidst a rally in Bitcoin.

data.title: LayerZero (ZRO) nears $1.72, up 1.24%, tests key support at lower Bollinger Band indicating oversold conditions.
data.description: The current trading price of LayerZero (ZRO) is $1.72, marking a daily increase of 1.24%. This movement is pushing the cryptocurrency to test crucial support at the lower Bollinger Band. Additionally, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates the potential for a rebound from oversold conditions. These developments come amidst a period of limited news activity affecting the market.

data.title: JASMY up by 5% post major listing despite Fed rate hike impact, trading at $0.01 after October 17 exchange debut.
data.description: JasmyCoin is currently priced at one cent following its successful listing on a prominent exchange on October 17. This development helped the digital currency in mitigating the effects of the Federal Reserve's interest rate increase concerns, which had exerted downward pressure on the cryptocurrency market earlier in the week.

data.title: FTX Token at $0.80 amid market volatility and 3.6% decline. Bitcoin correlation remains as broader crypto market shows weakness.
data.description: The FTX Token is currently trading at $0.80 after experiencing a 3.6% decrease. It is testing important support levels, mirroring the overall weakness in the cryptocurrency market. The token's performance continues to correlate with Bitcoin.

data.title: Mirror Lake Inn Resort and Spa named Best Resort in Northeast by Conde Nast Traveler Readers; ranked second overall.
data.description: In the latest Conde Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Awards for 2025, the Mirror Lake Inn Resort and Spa in New York has achieved notable acclaim. It has been named the top resort in the Northeastern United States and secured the second spot overall in the aggregated rankings. This recognition underscores the prestige and appeal of the resort among travelers and industry experts alike.

data.title: WhippleWood CPAs PC partners with Money Forward™ to enhance client service with tech, preserves team and leadership.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 17, 2025, WhippleWood CPAs PC revealed their partnership with Money Forward Partners, aiming to retain team members, leadership, and their personalized client approach. This move integrates WhippleWood's expertise with Money Forward's scale and technology. The collaboration seeks to combine WhippleWood's high-touch client experience with Money Forward's resources for a comprehensive service offering.

data.title: RWA token ONDO's price at $0.71 tests lower Bollinger Band support during broader crypto selloff, down 2.2% in 24 hrs.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ONDO is currently trading at $0.71, experiencing a 2.2% decrease in the last 24 hours. Its price is nearing a critical support level near $0.68, as indicated by the lower Bollinger Band. Technical indicators suggest that ONDO is oversold, implying a potential buying opportunity. No significant catalysts have been identified to explain the recent price movement.

data.title: Officials warn that Food Stamp benefits may stop in November if the government shutdown persists, impacting millions.
data.description: Millions of low-income individuals are facing the threat of losing access to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program if the government shutdown persists.

data.title: FAA allows Boeing to boost 737 Max production, raising limit imposed due to a door panel incident.
data.description: The production limit set by the Federal Aviation Administration, established following an incident where a door panel detached from a plane mid-flight last year, has now been increased.
